title: A Costco-grade engine, built in India.
description: Costco Wholesale India Private Limited is the Global Capability Center for Costco — designing, building, and running technology and operations for warehouses, e-commerce, and members worldwide. Announced in 2025, we're scaling from Hyderabad.

principles.v: Compliance and ethics, end to end.
Quality, value, and trust — every day.
Care, craft, and growth as a way of working.

fifthPrinciple.v: the natural outcome of living the four principles above.

panel.title: Why a GCC, why India, why Hyderabad?
panel.body: India is the world's largest hub for Global Capability Centers. Hyderabad pairs deep engineering and operations talent with strong policy support — a fit for Costco's quality-at-scale operating style.

bullets.v: Hyderabad's tech corridor — among India's strongest engineering ecosystems.
Build, learn, and ramp without compromising standards.
